title: DeathNote Plugin
description: A simple plugin that made for fun, adding Death Note from anime&manga series "Death Note", also adding custom item like Death Paper.
body:
Have you been wondered to become Kira in Minecraft world? This plugin will give you all to be like Light Yagami! Punish criminals or start anarchy on the server!

# Commands

**/getdeathnote** | **/getdn** — gives Death Note to the player who issued this command. Requires OP/kira permission to enter and get.

![How Death Note looks like](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b11038a273bd01f0c4315c75fba0b1866881053_0.webp)

**/getdeathpaper** | **/getdp** — gives Death Note Paper to the player who issued this command. Also requires OP/kira permission to enter command.

![Death Paper's description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c015b0bd44fb9c9a7967ba93df5a0c1872763b7.png)

**/spawndp <x, y, z>** — spawning Death Note Paper at the specified coordinates. Paper won't disapper. Requires OP/kira permission to enter.

![Death Paper spawned in the world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcda7b854a13068d25210f51edfe1ce5dd52f015.png)

**/delete <nick>** | **/del <nick>** — killing/dealing huge damage to the specified player within 5 seconds after written nickname, than another damage if player survived the first attack. The death message to whole server will be — "<player> died of a heart attack." Command is available to the all server players.

**/destroy <name> <time> <reason>** | **/des <name> <time> <reason>** — killing/dealing huge damage to the specified player after the written time expires. Victim will get message in 10 seconds before attack — "Your heart's beat has changed, like it will stop beating. 10 seconds left...", also get some negative effects like slowness, darkness and nausea. If victim leave the game and then join again, he'll get instant heart attack. Command is available only for those who has Death Note and Kira permission.

![Message to the victim before heart attack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3634638442a13685f94a345aad6a260045d64916.png)

Example of using command: **/destroy ItsRaidenn 15s died of overeating burgers. After 15 seconds, if victim dies, he and server will see: ItsRaidenn died of overeating burgers. If no, victim will see message: "You have survived, but the Note is still hunting on you..."**




# NOTE!
At the moment this plugin have only russian language, but if you would like this plugin or would want English translation, I'll do my best to add English language!

**Hope you'll enjoy this plugin :)**
